title: Admins may have encountered delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submission
impact: Admins may have encountered delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submission

updates.content:
Title: Admins may encounter delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submissions page

User impact: Admins may encounter delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submissions page.

Current status: We've identified that an increase in requests has caused a section of infrastructure, responsible for processing email submission grading, to perform below acceptable performance thresholds resulting in impact. We're applying performance optimizations to improve processing capacities to remediate impact.

Scope of impact: Impact is specific to any admin served through the affected infrastructure expecting email submission grading.

Root cause: An increase in requests has caused a section of infrastructure, responsible for processing email submission grading, to perform below acceptable performance thresholds resulting in impact. 

Next update by: Friday, April 24, 2026, at 10:30 AM UTC

Title: Admins may encounter delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submissions page

User impact: Admins may encounter delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submissions page.

Current status: We’re continuing our investigation into an issue impacting enterprise submission processing and have taken actions to stabilize the service. Submission flow has recovered, and we’re closely monitoring the environment to ensure processing continues normally while we work on additional steps to prevent recurrence.

Scope of impact: Impact is specific to any admin served through the affected infrastructure expecting email submission grading.

Root cause: An increase in requests has caused a section of infrastructure, responsible for processing email submission grading, to perform below acceptable performance thresholds resulting in impact.

Next update by: Friday, April 24, 2026, at 12:30 PM UTC

Title: Admins may have encountered delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submissions page

User impact: Admins may have encountered delays of up to 10 hours for grading results on Microsoft Defender for Office 365 submissions page.

Final status: We’ve confirmed, following a period monitoring service telemetry, that the performance optimizations we applied to improve processing capacities successfully remediated the issue.

Scope of impact: Impact was specific to any admin served through the affected infrastructure expecting email submission grading.

Start time: Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 6:36 AM UTC

End time: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 2:39 AM UTC

Root cause: An increase in requests caused a section of infrastructure responsible for processing email submission grading to perform below acceptable performance thresholds resulting in impact.

Next steps:
- We’re reviewing our service resilience processes to help us reduce or avoid similar issues in the future.

This is the final update for the event.
